description: Main application package initialization
acceptance_criteria: Package can be imported without errors

description: FastAPI application entry point with middleware, CORS, and route registration
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app starts successfully and serves OpenAPI docs at /docs

description: Environment-based configuration management with database URLs, JWT settings, and external integration configs
acceptance_criteria: Configuration loads from environment variables with proper defaults and validation

description: Async SQLAlchemy database connection, session management, and base model configuration
acceptance_criteria: Database sessions can be created and closed properly with async context

description: JWT authentication, password hashing, role-based access control decorators
acceptance_criteria: JWT tokens can be created, verified, and role permissions enforced

description: Models package initialization with all model imports
acceptance_criteria: All models can be imported from this package

description: User account and role management models with authentication support
acceptance_criteria: Users can be created with roles and authenticated against the database

description: Comprehensive audit log model for tracking all data modifications with polymorphic relationships
acceptance_criteria: Audit entries can be created for any model with user, timestamp, and change details

description: Policy entities with vehicle details, location info, coverage data, and search indexes
acceptance_criteria: Policies can be created with all required fields and support complex search queries

description: Claims linked to policies with claim-level policy overrides, subrogation support, and audit tracking
acceptance_criteria: Claims can be created with policy links and support policy data overrides with audit trails

description: Payment transactions with multiple payees, reserve allocation, and complex payment lifecycle management
acceptance_criteria: Payments can be created with multiple payment methods, payee allocations, and state transitions

description: Schemas package initialization with all schema imports
acceptance_criteria: All Pydantic schemas can be imported from this package

description: Authentication request/response schemas with JWT token models and user registration
acceptance_criteria: Login, token refresh, and user registration requests can be validated

description: Policy request/response schemas with search criteria, masking for sensitive data, and validation rules
acceptance_criteria: Policy data can be validated with proper SSN/TIN masking and search parameters

description: Claims request/response schemas with policy linking, audit trail data, and status filtering
acceptance_criteria: Claim data can be validated with policy references and audit information

description: Payment request/response schemas with multiple payment methods, payee details, and compliance data masking
acceptance_criteria: Payment data can be validated with proper PCI-DSS compliant data masking

description: API package initialization
acceptance_criteria: API package can be imported without errors

acceptance_criteria: Dependencies provide proper database sessions and enforce authentication/authorization

acceptance_criteria: All v1 routes are properly registered and accessible
